creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
This patch didn't work for me. make stage-qa ends up with:

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: 'lib/ruby/gems/2.1/doc/gitlab-grack-2.0.2/rdoc/js/search_index.js.gz' is referring to /usr/ports/www/rubygem-gitlab-grack/work/stage
Error: 'lib/ruby/gems/2.1/doc/gitlab-grack-2.0.2/rdoc/js/navigation.js.gz' is referring to /usr/ports/www/rubygem-gitlab-grack/work/stage
Error: 'lib/ruby/gems/2.1/doc/gitlab-grack-2.0.2/rdoc/js/searcher.js.gz' is referring to /usr/ports/www/rubygem-gitlab-grack/work/stage
*** Error code 1
